package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerMemoryAllocationClosureCaptureAllocatesInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_memory_allocation_closure_capture_allocates_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Memory allocation. Flag loop-local closures that capture variables in high-frequency paths and may force heap allocation."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
